microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end product delivery** for Azure's resilience validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ in outcomes** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 discovery and launch** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform — defined requirements, scoped self-service scheduling with engineering, and reduced operational toil by **30%**, transitioning execution from manual coordination to a scalable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model adopted across the org.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility and translating field observations into concrete product and process decisions.

Built an **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring prioritization cycles to cut planning time by 39% and expand drill capacity by 21% — directly increasing the team's ability to ship outcomes without adding headcount.

Defined success metrics and owned adoption outcomes across partner integrations, pressure-testing platform capabilities against real enterprise environments and feeding field findings back into roadmap prioritization with engineering and design.

Partnered with Sales and Customer Success to shape **launch narratives** and enablement materials for new resilience capabilities, ensuring features shipped to enterprise partners were positioned, understood, and actively adopted in production workflows.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows across Azure, running field demos and structured onboarding sessions that built utilization across 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and influencing prioritization to include intent-based YAML generation — translating field observations into concrete scoping decisions.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster, more accurate access to technical content across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and reduced region launch timelines by 28% by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — scoping tradeoffs and building consensus without a playbook.

Ran structured **discovery with 20+ service teams** to map 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical paths — translating ambiguous field findings into a clear product strategy for leadership.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the real-time data insights needed to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments across the region launch portfolio.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and sequencing rollout to achieve zero operational downtime — owning the full initiative from scoping through field execution.

Prioritized a complex backlog across IT, Operations, and Engineering, facilitating sprint planning and retrospectives that resolved **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilized the developer intake process during a high-stakes hardware-software transition.

Drove **cross-functional alignment** between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual intervention across a distributed robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, redesigning CRM workflows to reduce friction and improve conversion rates across the full customer acquisition funnel.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence, Google profile, and positioning to align messaging with how target customers actually made decisions.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks — translating raw field data into actionable intelligence that shaped operational and pricing strategy.
